title: calophyllum ferrugineum var. orientale
intro: Calophyllum ferrugineum var. orientale, also known as the Oriental ironwood or red beech, is a plant species belonging to the family Calophyllaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Calophyllum ferrugineum var. orientale include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's essential oil is often extracted and used in aromatherapy, while its leaves and bark are used in teas and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
